text:
Teardrops of hope is a digital single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number NOPA-3212, it was released on 19 December 2022. https://vgmdb.net/album/123921 It was featured in the soundtrack of the P Godzilla vs. Evangelion ~G Cell Awakening~ pachinko machine.

Tracklist

Staff

Composition: Yoko Takahashi
Lyrics: Yoko Takahashi
Arrangements: Toshiyuki Ohmori 
Vocals: Yoko Takahashi https://news.kingrecords.co.jp/2022/12/8757/
